description: Create a spatial grid index for hotels in the 'demodb' database. Define a 'GeographicZone' vertex class with a unique 'ZoneID' string property and an 'InZone' edge class. Link each hotel to a 'GeographicZone' vertex (Hotel -> GeographicZone) where the 'ZoneID' is the integer part of the hotel's latitude and longitude formatted as '{Lat}_{Lon}' (e.g., 41.89, 12.49 results in '41_12'). Export a report to '~/zone_density_report.txt' listing the top 5 zones by hotel count in the format 'ZoneID: <ID>, Count: <N>'.
